title: Finnish phone-maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
snippet: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot app, which supports 22 Indic languages

title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
snippet: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.
